title: Protocol to filter free steroids from serum using ultrafiltration and extract steroids via liquid-liquid extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ygcuk","text":"Direct measurement of free glucocorticoids in small volumes of mouse and rat serum using ultrafiltration and liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"hkzgu","text":"Recommended schedule:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uxkqo","text":"- Day 1: Prep and conduct ultrafiltration on serum samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"seasx","text":"- Day 2: Prep and extract steroids from ultrafiltered serum samples using liquid-liquid extraction","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"1a9qw","text":"Only use HPLC- or LCMS- grade reagents.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bfth7","text":"Only use fresh MilliQ water (i.e., do not used water stored for a long time, or in container that has been opened/closed multiple times).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a86og","text":"Only use polypropylene-grade plastics.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8pb5i","text":"Rinse all glassware (except for LC-MS/MS vials/inserts) with HPLC-grade methanol two times.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"vijm4","text":"Safety and caution notes present on these pages:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kc6wa","text":"- Keep serum samples at physiological body temperature (i.e., 37°C for mice) during processing to preserve free glucocorticoid distribution.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ythsm","text":"- It will take at least 30 min for the centrifuge to stabilize at 37°C — ensure devices are prewarmed before use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8pud5","text":"- Discard used ultrafiltration devices in biohazard waste.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"k0ebc","text":"- Handle samples and disposables using appropriate biosafety precautions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"56voj","text":"- Note to leave sufficient serum for non-filtered aliquots (5 µl) before filtering.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yjcah","text":"- Only work with ethyl acetate (highly volatile) in the fume hood using appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d6640","text":"- Work quickly to minimize ethyl acetate evaporation when added to BR tubes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jjlgh","text":"- Follow institutional safety procedures when working with organic solvents (e.g., Ethyl Acetate, Methanol)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bbu1q","text":"- Use caution when operating the N2 gas manifold and ensure proper ventilation and secure connections to prevent leaks.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mf1ft","text":"- Cap glass LC-MS/MS vials carefully and ensure there are no air bubbles in the samples prior to storage/injection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"hlwmk","text":"Materials and equipment explicitly listed on these pages:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qt1xn","text":"- Ultrafiltration device (#4104, Sigma-Aldrich, Oakville, Ontario, Canada)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lddhy","text":"- Bead ruptor (BR) tubes (Fisher Scientific, Cat # NC0934160) containing five 1.4 mm ceramic oxide beads per tube (2 BR tubes per serum sample: 1 for free glucocorticoids, 1 for total glucocorticoids)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"k4bdb","text":"- Avanti J-15R centrifuge (Beckman Coulter) with rotor adaptors that fit the ultrafiltration devices","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rbo2v","text":"- Water bath set to 37°C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aqvhu","text":"- Bucket with wet ice","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"skw5l","text":"- Pipettes and appropriate tips (able to pipette 5 µl, ≥30 µl, 10 µl, 50 µl, and 1 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"0gubb","text":"- Red reservoir caps for ultrafiltration devices","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qgcb0","text":"- Collection tubes for ultrafiltrate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2lgar","text":"- Biohazard waste container for discarded ultrafiltration devices","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"56iua","text":"- Standards and quality control samples as in Table 2 (steroid/glucocorticoid standards at pg/10 µl): Standard 1 = 0.4; 2 = 0.8; 3 = 2; 4 = 5; 5 = 12.5; 6 = 50; 7 = 100; 8 = 200; 9 = 500; 10 = 1000; 11 = 2000 pg/10 µl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ykvql","text":"- Quality control — Low concentration x3 = 2 pg/10 µl; High concentration x3 = 200 pg/10 µl","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kur45","text":"- Blanks: Blank x2; Double blank x2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c3yyt","text":"- BR tubes for filtered and non-filtered serum aliquots (stored at -70°C)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"soc5p","text":"- Oven (preheat to 60°C)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hhizo","text":"- 0.6 mL polypropylene microcentrifuge tubes (labelled to correspond with BR tubes)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amprr","text":"- 2 mL glass LC-MS/MS vials (with glass inserts) corresponding to BR tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"t2bee","text":"- Caps for LC-MS/MS vials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c39oy","text":"- 12x75 mm glass culture tubes (MeOH-rinsed and oven-dried) — prepare two distinct glass culture tubes per sample (labelled e.g., 1a, 2a,... and 1b, 2b,...). Cover with aluminum foil until use","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xmtgk","text":"- 20 mL scintillation vials and a Duran bottle for MilliQ water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gdol5","text":"- HPLC-grade Ethyl Acetate, Methanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"i9tbq","text":"- Fresh Milli-Q water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2xpi1","text":"- Ability to prepare 50% MeOH and 25% MeOH solutions in rinsed 20 mL scintillation glass vials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"q0ili","text":"- Small water bath (preheat to 65°C in fume hood)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pinqw","text":"- Vortex mixer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uf2iu","text":"- Homogenizer/bead ruptor capable of 4 m/s","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hsnzq","text":"- Centrifuge capable of 16,100 g","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"vh6dg","text":"- Glass culture tubes labelled to collect supernatant (e.g., 1a, 2a, 3a, ...)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ah4qh","text":"- Aluminum foil for covering glass tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sfe1q","text":"- Manifold with N2 gas supply (nitrogen gas manifold for drying Ethyl Acetate under N2)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kmncd","text":"- Tools for transferring ~150 µl to LC-MS/MS vials (pipettes/tips)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ff2k6","text":"- Storage freezer set to -20°C (for extracted samples prior to injection)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Label 1 ultrafiltration device (#4104, Sigma-Aldrich, Oakville, Ontario, Canada) per serum sample
Once serum samples are thawed, place serum samples in water bath at 37°C (physiological body temperature of mice) for 10 min
Remove red reservoir caps off all labelled ultrafiltration devices
Pipette at least 30 µl serum of each sample into its respective ultrafiltration device, ensuring that you keep >5 µl of serum for total steroid measurement
Cap ultrafiltration devices
Spin ultrafiltration devices at 2000 g at 37°C (physiological body temperature for mice) for 1 hr
While serum samples are being centrifuged, add 5 µl of remainder of each serum sample to respective labelled BR tubes labelled for total steroid measurement (i.e., non-filtered serum samples)
After spinning ultrafiltration devices for 1hr, transfer the entire ultrafiltrate from filter collection tubes to corresponding new BR tubes (i.e., filtered serum samples)
Discard used ultrafiltration devices in appropriate waste according to institutional policies (e.g., biohazard waste)

Obtain and label 1 set of bead ruptor (BR) tube containing 5 1.4mm ceramic oxide beads per standard curve/quality control/blank/double blank samples (filtered/non-filtered serum samples should already be in BR tubes)
Label sealed 0.6 mL polypropylene microcentrifuge tubes to correspond with all BR tubes
Place glass inserts into glass LC-MS/MS vials
Add 10 µL of standard curve standards (0.02 pg/µL - 400 pg/µL, depending on study) to respective BR tubes
Add 50 µL internal standard mix (10 pg/µL) to all BR tubes except double blank BR tubes
Add 60 µL of HPLC-grade 50% methanol into double blank BR tubes to make volumes equal
Add 1 mL HPLC-grade Ethyl Acetate into all BR tubes (standard curve, blanks, double blanks, quality controls, samples) in fume hood
Vortex all BR tubes for 2 sec
Homogenize samples at 4 m/s for 30 sec using a bead mill homogenizer (i.e., Fisherbrand‱ Bead Mill 24 Homogenizer, Cat # 15-340-163)
Centrifuge samples at 16,100 g for 5 min at room temperature
Remove 1000 µl of supernatant and place in respective 12x75 mm glass culture tubes (i.e., glass culture tubes labelled 1a, 2a, 3a, ..., n a)
Add 500 µl MilliQ water to all samples
Vortex all samples for 5 sec
Centrifuge samples at 3200 g for 2 min at room temperature

Carefully remove top liquid layer (ethyl acetate) from samples (without disturbing tissue pellets at the bottom) and transfer to respective new glass culture tubes (e.g., tubes labelled 1b, 2b, 3b, ..., n b), in a fume hood
Dry samples (in ethyl acetate in glass culture tubes) in water bath at 65°C for 8 min with N 2 gas, in a fume hood
Resuspend dried samples in glass culture tubes with 200 µl 25% HPLC-grade methanol
Vortex samples in glass culture tubes for 5 sec to ensure resuspension
Centrifuge samples in glass culture tubes at 3200 g for 1 min at room temperature
Transfer sample (whole volume) to respective 0.6 mL polypropylene microcentrifuge tubes
Centrifuge samples in 0.6 mL polypropylene microcentrifuge tubes at 16,100 g for 2 min at room temperature
Transfer 150 µl of supernatant to respective glass LC-MS/MS vial glass inserts
Cap glass LC-MS/MS vials and ensure no air bubbles in the samples
Store samples in glass LC-MS/MS vials in -20°C until injection into mass spectrometer (MS)
Label 1 set of bead ruptor (BR) tube (Fisher Scientific, Cat # NC0934160) containing 5 1.4mm ceramic oxide beads for all serum samples for free steroid measurement
Store non-filtered serum samples for total steroid measurement (5 µl) at -70°C until extraction
Store filtered serum samples for free steroid measurement (entire volume) at -70°C until extraction
Store any remaining serum that was not used for free and total serum measurement in -70°C
Label 2 mL glass LC-MS/MS vials to correspond with all BR tubes
Obtain 2 sets of 12x75 mm glass culture tubes
Vortex 12x75 mm glass culture tubes containing 1mL HPLC-grade methanol to rinse glassware for 2s
Add 1mL of HPLC-grade methanol to all 12x75 mm glass culture tubes
Discard HPLC-grade methanol from all 12x75 mm glass culture tubes
Repeat steps 22-24 to rinse 12x75 mm glass culture tubes a second time
Place rinsed 12x75 mm glass culture tubes (rinsed twice) upside down in metal tube rack
Dry rinsed 12x75 mm glass culture tubes (rinsed twice) upside down in oven at 60°C for 10min
Invert rinsed and dried 12x75 mm glass culture tubes to be right-side up in tube rack
Cover rinsed and dried 12x75 mm glass culture tubes with aluminum foil under ready to use
Cover glass LC-MS/MS vials with aluminum foil to store until ready to use
Rinse 2 20 mL scintillation vials, a 500mL Duran bottle for MilliQ water, and 3 500mL beakers, with HPLC-grade methanol
Discard of methanol glassware rinse waste
Repeat steps 36-37 to rinse glassware twice
Dry rinsed 20mL scintillation vials, 500mL Duran bottle, 3 500mL beakers (e.g., in fume hood)
Retrieve 500mL of fresh MilliQ water in rinsed 500mL Duran bottle
Preheat water bath to 65°C in the fume hood
Prepare 10 mL of 50% HPLC-grade methanol (diluted with MilliQ water) in rinsed 20 mL scintillation glass vial
Preheat oven to 60°C
Prepare 20 mL of 25% HPLC-grade methanol (diluted with MilliQ water) in rinsed 20 mL scintillation glass vial
Thaw standard curve standards (0.02 pg/µL - 400 pg/µL, depending on study) and internal standard mix (10 pg/µL) (stored at -20°C) on bench top and allow to come to room temperature
Thaw filtered, and non-filtered serum samples (in BR tubes) for free and total steroid measurement, respectively (stored at -70°C) gently on wet ice
Add 10 µL of HPLC-grade 50% methanol into blank BR tubes to make volumes equal
Add 10 µL of low concentration (0.2 pg/µL) and high concentration (20 pg/µL) quality controls to respective BR tubes
Label first set of rinsed and dried 12x75 mm glass culture tubes 1a, 2a, 3a, ..., n a
Label second set of rinsed and dried 12x75 mm glass culture tubes 1b, 2b, 3b, ..., n b
Discard the glass culture tubes containing MilliQ water waste
Inject sample into LC-MS/MS system according to manufacturer's guidelines (in our case, we injected 35 µl of each sample into LC-MS/MS)
Label second set of bead ruptor (BR) tube (Fisher Scientific, Cat # NC0934160) containing 5 1.4mm ceramic oxide beads for all serum samples for total steroid measurement
Obtain ice bucket with wet ice
Thaw serum samples gently on wet ice

Prewarm centrifuge (Avanti J-15R, Beckman Coulter) and rotor adaptors (to fit the ultrafiltration devices) to 37°C (physiological body temperature of mice). You may need to spin centrifuge (i.e., 2000 g) for device to warm, follow manufacturer's instructions.
Warm water bath to 37°C (physiological body temperature of mice)
creator: melody.salehzadeh
